examples: A clumsy dull person; a lout.
This other man I had dreamed a drunken, vain-glorious lout.
Having the characteristics of a lout; awkward, stupid, and boorish.
It is questionable, however, whether the word ulug (lout) has dropped out of current Arabic usage.
Mr Tyers and his son, a Royal Marine, made a citizen's arrest and drove the lout to the local police station.
